utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Each one includes the necessary details: health_coverage includes provider, coverage type, and costs; property_coverage includes provider, coverage type, and costs; travel_coverage includes provider, coverage type, and costs; additional_services includes enhancement services with costs; total_budget includes a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. All items are fully specified with costs and relevant coverage details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes several components: (1) Health coverage from 'HealthFirst' described as 'Comprehensive global health with mental health and wellness programs', which corresponds most closely to 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' under both physical and mental health in the ground-truth ratings. (2) Property coverage labeled 'Existing policy (unchanged)'—no specific plan name is given, so it cannot be mapped directly to any rated plan. (3) Travel coverage integrated with HealthFirst, also suggesting the 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' association, but the ground-truth ratings do not list HealthFirst under travel insurance, so no direct match is available there. (4) An additional travel assistance service that provides '24/7 travel support, global concierge services, emergency coordination'—this best aligns with the '24/7 Travel Assistance' option in travel enhancement services. Therefore, the mappable items from the final plan are 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' and '24/7 Travel Assistance'.
